title: Generate case statement for simple mux trees
body:
This should turn into a case statement rather than nested ?:
```
module attributes {firrtl.mainModule = "top_mod"}  {
  sv.verbatim "// Standard header to adapt well known macros to our needs."
  sv.verbatim ""
  rtl.module @top_mod(%sel: i2, %a: i8, %b: i8, %c: i8) -> (%y: i8) {
    %c0_i2 = rtl.constant 0 : i2
    %c1_i2 = rtl.constant 1 : i2
    %c-1_i8 = rtl.constant -1 : i8
    %c-2_i2 = rtl.constant -2 : i2
    %0 = comb.icmp eq %sel, %c-2_i2 : i2
    %1 = comb.mux %0, %c, %c-1_i8 : i8
    %2 = comb.icmp eq %sel, %c1_i2 : i2
    %3 = comb.mux %2, %b, %1 : i8
    %4 = comb.icmp eq %sel, %c0_i2 : i2
    %5 = comb.mux %4, %a, %3 : i8
    rtl.output %5 : i8
  }
}
```
